recommendations.title: American Pie Presents: Girls' Rules
recommendations.overview: It's Senior year at East Great Falls. Annie, Kayla, Michelle, and Stephanie decide to harness their girl power and band together to get what they want their last year of high school.

recommendations.title: Blue Crush 2
recommendations.overview: Haunted by the memory of her deceased mother, Dana leaves Malibu behind and heads to South Africa to fulfill her mother's dream of surfing Jefferys Bay.

recommendations.title: The Scorpion King 4: Quest for Power
recommendations.overview: When he is betrayed by a trusted friend, Mathayus must marshal all his strength and cunning to outwit a formidable opponent who will stop at nothing to unlock a supreme ancient power.

recommendations.title: All Is Bright
recommendations.overview: Two ne’er-do-wells from Quebec travel to New York City with a scheme to get rich quick selling Christmas trees.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Men Are from Mars... And That's Where I'm Going!

recommendations.title: Screwed
recommendations.overview: A chauffeur kidnaps his rich boss's dog to hold it for ransom, but when she accidentally gets the dog back, she thinks that it's the chauffeur who's been kidnapped.

recommendations.title: Tommy Boy
recommendations.overview: To save the family business, two ne’er-do-well traveling salesmen hit the road with disastrously funny consequences.

recommendations.title: Muriel, or the Time of Return
recommendations.overview: In the seacoast town of Boulogne, antique furniture saleswoman Hélène lives with her stepson, Bernard, who's back from military duty in Algiers. An old lover of Hélène's comes to visit, Alphonse, with his niece Françoise; he too is back from Algiers,

recommendations.title: Patrick
recommendations.overview: A woman's chaotic life becomes more complicated when she inherits her grandmother's dog.
